<!-- Thank you for contributing. Please fill out the sections that apply. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one. Fixes #123 -->

## Why?

<!-- The motivation. If this is for a CCDC-identified pain point, link the discussion. -->

## Privacy impact

<!-- Required. Even if the answer is "none, this is a docs change," say so. -->

- [ ] Adds, removes, or changes a network request.
- [ ] Adds, removes, or changes data stored on the device.
- [ ] Adds a new dependency. (List it. Why is it needed? What's its license, maintenance status, and dependency tree?)
- [ ] Adds telemetry, analytics, or error reporting. (Stop. This should never happen. Open an issue first.)
- [ ] None of the above; this change does not affect privacy.

## Accessibility impact

<!-- Required. -->

- [ ] Changes UI or interaction.
- [ ] Tested with keyboard only.
- [ ] Tested with at least one screen reader (note which: NVDA, VoiceOver, TalkBack, JAWS).
- [ ] axe-core automated tests pass.
- [ ] Color contrast verified at AA minimum (AAA preferred for body text).
- [ ] Plain-language strings checked at 6th grade reading level (if user-facing copy added).
- [ ] None of the above; this change does not affect UI.

## Rule library changes (if applicable)

<!-- For changes to rules/co/*.yaml -->

- [ ] Cited a source for every fact added or changed (HCPF, CMS, statute, regulation, or named CCDC reviewer).
- [ ] Reviewed by a CCDC advocate or attorney (link to review or note who).
- [ ] Updated `docs/colorado-rules.md` to match.

## Tests

- [ ] Added or updated tests.
- [ ] `npm run test` passes locally.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally.

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated docs in `docs/` if behavior changed.
- [ ] Updated `web/README.md` if dev workflow changed.

## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused (one logical change).
- [ ] No new dependencies without justification.
- [ ] No `console.log`, debug code, or commented-out code left in.
- [ ] No em dashes in code comments or user-facing copy.
